response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Lyrics matched closely. On-screen text resolved discrepancies (e.g., '絵空事' instead of '星座事'). 2. JSON Usage: Used as a structural reference. Talk segments transcribed manually. 3. Timing: Anchored strictly to audio cues. Talk segments partitioned logically.

subtitles.original: つないだ線 解かないで
subtitles.english: Don't untie the connected line

subtitles.original: 僕がどんなに眩しくても
subtitles.english: No matter how dazzling I am

subtitles.original: もうすぐ時計は8時
subtitles.english: The clock is soon to be 8 o'clock

subtitles.original: 夜空に満天の星
subtitles.english: The night sky is full of stars

subtitles.original: 何億光年 離れたところにはもうないかもしれない
subtitles.english: They might not even exist anymore from billions of light-years away

subtitles.original: 月が綺麗で
subtitles.english: The moon is so beautiful...

subtitles.original: 泣きそうになるのは
subtitles.english: And the reason I feel like crying is

subtitles.original: いつの日にか
subtitles.english: Because one day

subtitles.original: 別れが来るから
subtitles.english: Our parting will surely come

subtitles.original: 君と集まって星座になれたら
subtitles.english: If I could gather with you and become a constellation

subtitles.original: 彗星みたい 流れるひとりごと
subtitles.english: A monologue flowing like a comet

subtitles.original: 消えていく残像は 真夜中のプリズム
subtitles.english: The disappearing afterimage is a midnight prism

subtitles.original: 君と集まって星座になれたら
subtitles.english: If I could gather with you and become a constellation

subtitles.original: 切なる願い 誰かに届いたかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if my earnest wish reached someone

subtitles.original: 変われるかな 夜の淵を
subtitles.english: I wonder if I can change, tracing the edge of the night

subtitles.original: なぞるような こんな僕でも
subtitles.english: Even a me like this

subtitles.original: 遥か彼方 僕らは出会ってしまった
subtitles.english: Far away, we happened to meet

subtitles.original: カルマだから 何度も出会ってしまうよ
subtitles.english: Because it's karma, we will meet again and again

subtitles.original: 雲の隙間で
subtitles.english: Through the gaps in the clouds

subtitles.original: 君と集まって星座になれたら
subtitles.english: If I could gather with you and become a constellation

subtitles.original: 夜広げて 描こう絵空事
subtitles.english: Spreading the night, let's paint our wild dreams

subtitles.original: 暗闇を 照らすような 満月じゃなくても
subtitles.english: Even if it's not a full moon that lights up the darkness

subtitles.original: だから集まって星座になりたい
subtitles.english: So I want to gather with you and become a constellation

subtitles.original: 色とりどりの光 放つような
subtitles.english: Releasing a light of all sorts of colors

subtitles.original: つないだ線 解かないよ
subtitles.english: Don't untie the connected line

subtitles.original: 君がどんなに眩しくても
subtitles.english: No matter how dazzling you are

subtitles.original: AZKi 8th Birthday Live CROSSOVER 平成 vs 令和 アニソン歌合戦！平成・赤チーム...
subtitles.english: AZKi 8th Birthday Live CROSSOVER: Heisei vs Reiwa Anisong Battle! Red Team representing Heisei...

subtitles.original: ロボ子さん！
subtitles.english: Roboco-san!

subtitles.original: 楽曲はアニメ『円盤皇女ワるきゅーレ』より『Agape』。
subtitles.english: Her song is 'Agape' from the anime 'UFO Princess Valkyrie'.

subtitles.original: 続いて令和・青チーム...
subtitles.english: Next up, Blue Team representing Reiwa...

subtitles.original: 水宮枢！
subtitles.english: Mizumiya Suu!

subtitles.original: 楽曲は令和版アニメ『うる星やつら』より『トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ』。
subtitles.english: Her song is 'Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous' from the Reiwa version of 'Urusei Yatsura'.

subtitles.original: 宇宙から届いた2つのラブソング、2曲続けてどうぞ！
subtitles.english: Please enjoy these two love songs from space back-to-back!

subtitles.original: Would you call me if you need my love?
subtitles.english: Would you call me if you need my love?

subtitles.original: どこにいたって聞こえる
subtitles.english: Wherever I am, I can hear you

subtitles.original: 君がくれる agape
subtitles.english: The agape that you give me

subtitles.original: 力の限り dive!
subtitles.english: Dive with all your might!

subtitles.original: みつめる 触れ合う その時
subtitles.english: Gazing and touching each other, at that very moment...

subtitles.original: 愛は二人を試している
subtitles.english: Love is testing the two of us
